==Deadly Ironball==
[[File:Deadly Ironball.png|100px|left|alt=Deadly Ironball]]
It weighs 109 tons! It can smash enemies before battle starts!

1. Intercept [[Hitmen|Hitman No. 4]]

2. Raise [[Big Guy Park]] friendship to level 3

3. Use the {{RewardIconWithText|Deadly Ironball Tome}} he gives you to unlock Deadly Ironball
{{clear}}

{{RewardIconWithText|Deadly Ironball}} is the [[Realm Traits|Realm Trait]] for [[Koryeo]].

When first obtained, {{RewardIconWithText|Deadly Ironball}} is automatically in use (unlock other [[Realm Traits]], which have to be enabled) and deals 90% DMG to enemies before the fight begins. This is at level 1, and after upgrading to maximum (level 30), the Ironball can deal 150% DMG to enemies and can then be unsealed with {{RewardIconWithLink|Magic Potion}}. Ironball not only costs a great deal of {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}s, but also costs other expensive things such as {{RewardIconWithLink|Incense|orange}}. It isn't recommended to upgrade this beyond what is absolutely necessary for early-game fights since other Realm Traits are much better. 

===Upgrade Materials===
{| class="wikitable"
!Lv.
!Materials
|-
|10 > 11
|1 {{RewardIconWonderFungusWithText|Blue|HP|blue}} 
|-
|15 > 16
|1 {{RewardIconWonderFungusWithText|Blue|ATK|blue}} 
|-
|20 > 21
|30 {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Reagent|purple}}
|-
|25 > 26
|2 {{RewardIconWithLink|Incense|orange}}
|-
|29 > 30
|[[Consumables|Unknown Magic Potion]] obtained from the [[Altar|Dragon Wish "I want girl power!"]]
|}
Note that using Unknown Magic Potion will also turn [[Big Guy Park]] into Big Gal Park and reward {{RewardIconWithLink|Big Guy Park's Chest Hair|blue}}, a blue organ that increases the effect of Deadly Ironball by 30% altogether when fully awakened.

==Stats==
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}} Cost
!Effect
|-
|1
|
|Before combat, deal 90% DMG
|-
|2
|3k
|Before combat, deal 92% DMG
|-
|3
|4k
|Before combat, deal 94% DMG
|-
|4
|5k
|Before combat, deal 96% DMG
|-
|5
|6k
|Before combat, deal 98% DMG
|-
|6
|7k
|Before combat, deal 100% DMG
|-
|7
|8k
|Before combat, deal 102% DMG
|-
|8
|9k
|Before combat, deal 104% DMG
|-
|9
|10k
|Before combat, deal 106% DMG
|-
|10
|11k
|Before combat, deal 108% DMG
|-
|11
|12k
|Before combat, deal 110% DMG
|-
|12
|13k
|Before combat, deal 112% DMG
|-
|13
|14k
|Before combat, deal 114% DMG
|-
|14
|15k
|Before combat, deal 116% DMG
|-
|15
|16k
|Before combat, deal 118% DMG
|-
|16
|17k
|Before combat, deal 120% DMG
|-
|17
|18k
|Before combat, deal 122% DMG
|-
|18
|19k
|Before combat, deal 124% DMG
|-
|19
|20k
|Before combat, deal 126% DMG
|-
|20
|21k
|Before combat, deal 128% DMG
|-
|21
|22k
|Before combat, deal 130% DMG
|-
|22
|23k
|Before combat, deal 132% DMG
|-
|23
|24k
|Before combat, deal 134% DMG
|-
|24
|25k
|Before combat, deal 136% DMG
|-
|25
|26k
|Before combat, deal 138% DMG
|-
|26
|27k
|Before combat, deal 140% DMG
|-
|27
|28k
|Before combat, deal 142% DMG
|-
|28
|29k
|Before combat, deal 144% DMG
|-
|29
|30k
|Before combat, deal 146% DMG
|-
|30
|40k
|Before combat, deal 150% DMG
|}

==Unsealing==
Once the {{RewardIconWithText|Deadly Ironball}} has been upgraded to the max level (30), you have the option to Unseal the Spirit trapped inside. 

Doing this costs 300 {{RewardIconWithLink|Magic Potion}}. Unsealing releases the spirit Kwan Bear, who will gift you {{RewardIconWithLink|Koryeon Treasure Map, +50}} and {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +60k}} as a thank you. 

Upgrading Kwan Bear is quite expensive, but doing so gives permanent buffs to your snail. 
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Tier
! rowspan="2" |{{RewardIconWithText|Magic Potion}} Cost
! rowspan="2" |{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}} Cost
! colspan="4" |Cumulative effect, or
|-
!HP +
!ATK +
!DEF +
!RUSH
|-
|T1
|
|
|200
|20
|20
|40
|-
|T2
|100
|4k
|400
|40
|40
|80
|-
|T3
|110
|6k
|600
|60
|60
|120
|-
|T4
|120
|8k
|800
|80
|80
|160
|-
|T5
|130
|10k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |Deadly Ironball effect +5%
|-
|T6
|150
|12k
|1100
|110
|110
|220
|-
|T7
|170
|14k
|1400
|140
|140
|280
|-
|T8
|190
|16k
|1700
|170
|170
|340
|-
|T9
|210
|18k
|2000
|200
|200
|400
|-
|T10
|230
|20k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |Deadly Ironball DMG +5%
|-
|T11
|260
|22k
|2400
|240
|240
|480
|-
|T12
|290
|24k
|2800
|280
|280
|560
|-
|T13
|320
|26k
|3200
|320
|320
|640
|-
|T14
|350
|28k
|3600
|360
|360
|720
|-
|T15
|380
|30k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |Deadly Ironball effect +10%
|-
|T16
|420
|32k
|4100
|410
|410
|820
|-
|T17
|460
|34k
|4600
|460
|460
|920
|-
|T18
|500
|36k
|5100
|510
|510
|1020
|-
|T19
|540
|38k
|5600
|560
|560
|1120
|-
|T20
|580
|40k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |Deadly Ironball DMG +10%
|-
|T21
|630
|42k
|6200
|620
|620
|1240
|-
|T22
|680
|44k
|6800
|680
|680
|1360
|-
|T23
|730
|46k
|7400
|740
|740
|1480
|-
|T24
|780
|48k
|8000
|800
|800
|1600
|-
|T25
|830
|50k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |Deadly Ironball effect +15%
|-
|T26
|890
|52k
|8800
|880
|880
|1760
|-
|T27
|950
|54k
|9600
|960
|960
|1920
|-
|T28
|1010
|56k
|10400
|1040
|1040
|2080
|-
|T29
|1070
|58k
|11200
|1120
|1120
|2240
|-
|T30
|1130
|60k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |Deadly Ironball DMG +15%
|-
|T31
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T32
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T33
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T34
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T35
|
|
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |Deadly Ironball Effect +20%
|-
|T36
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T37
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T38
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T39
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T40
|
|
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |Deadly Ironball DMG +20%
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Koryeo]]
[[Category:Realm Trait]]
